name: Burning Man's Prayer

actions.name: Call to the Burning Man
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model must be within 1" of the centerline.
actions.effects: This model heals 2 and gains a Burning token. If this crew's fervor bar has not been increased this turn, increase it by 1.

tokens.name: Burning
tokens.text:
The following cumulative effects apply based on the level of Burning Man's Prayer's fervor bar:
1 Fervor: Damage from friendly Burning tokens is dealt to enemy models within X", instead of base contact. X equals the level of this crew's fervor bar.
2 Fervor: Friendly Burning tokens are not removed during the end phase.
3 Fervor: Attacks targeting enemies with a friendly Burning token which deal damage, deal +1 damage.

extraction_notes: Card includes a fervor bar with three levels (1, 2, 3)
Token effects are cumulative based on fervor bar level
Call to the Burning Man has a diamond icon indicating it may be a special action type (1" of centerline restriction)
